---
title: 'Church Notes @Gatewaypeople'
date: '2014-03-12T21:45:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '264040221104068563'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/church-notes-gatewaypeople.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Church Notes'
---

Church Notes @Gatewaypeople<br />03/09/2014<br />Church Survey from 7 years ago.<br /><br />Overview <br /><br />1. Exploring God. Attending Church but not saved yet. Fellowship <br />T-the cross divides here...<br /><br />2. Beginning in God. Relationship.<br /><br />3. Close to God. Discipleship.<br /><br />4. God Centered. Lordship.<br /><br />Mark 4<br /><br /> Seed fell on four groups.<br /><br /><br /><br />Levels of Friendship<br /><br />1. Don't talk<br />&nbsp;- Its not works.<br />&nbsp;- ?<br />&nbsp;- Free Gift .<br /><br />Grace<br /><br />2. Became Friends<br /><br />God's Word<br /><br />3. Talk Often. Best Friends<br /><br />Giving<br /><br /><br />4. Committed into death.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Note*<br />What if you take what you HATE to do and use it as a chance to do what you LOVE to do???<br /><br /><br /><br />
